paramiko/auth_handler.py:326.label: TP
paramiko/auth_handler.py:326.reason: Assigns pubkey_algo = "ssh-rsa-cert-v01@openssh.com" to force SHA-1 RSA cert algorithm for old OpenSSH; a real host-key algorithm selection.

paramiko/dsskey.py:46.label: TP
paramiko/dsskey.py:46.reason: name = "ssh-dss" declares the DSS (DSA) SSH key type on the DSSKey class that implements DSA sign/verify.

paramiko/ecdsakey.py:277.reason: ec.generate_private_key(curve, ...) genuinely generates an ECDSA private key.

paramiko/ecdsakey.py:314.label: TP
paramiko/ecdsakey.py:314.reason: ec.derive_private_key(...) derives a real ECDSA private key from OpenSSH-format key material.

paramiko/kex_ecdh_nist.py:59.reason: ec.generate_private_key generates the ephemeral EC key for the NIST-curve ECDH key exchange.

paramiko/pkey.py:113.label: TP
paramiko/pkey.py:113.reason: _CIPHER_TABLE entry "DES-EDE3-CBC" configures 3DES (TripleDES) for encrypted PEM private keys.

paramiko/pkey.py:114.label: TP
